title: Polish Pinake commands toolbar and setup flow
description:
Created from the project state audit.

Improve the native VS Code interface polish that remains after the first interface audit tasks.

Scope:
- Normalize visible command titles to singular `Pinake:` while preserving existing command IDs for compatibility.
- Reduce crowded view-title toolbar ordering so daily-use actions are easier to scan than setup/maintenance actions.
- Add a final setup summary before writing files in the creation wizard.
- Add command/keybinding parity for frequent actions: preview, edit, favorite, reveal, copy path, and validate.
- Keep all changes on native VS Code surfaces; do not introduce a custom webview.

Code anchors: `package.json:70`, `package.json:189`, `src/commands/PinakesCommands.ts:60`.

checklist.text: Normalize visible command titles to singular `Pinake:` without removing existing command IDs
Reorder or reduce view-title toolbar actions for daily-use scanning
Add a final setup summary step before file writes
Add command/keybinding parity tests for frequent actions
